pi_items.source: Confirmed by PLOT_PATH variable in export_result.sh which evaluates the file's existence and size.
Confirmed by REPORT_PATH variable in export_result.sh which reads and extracts the expected value from this path.
Confirmed by setup_task.sh which computationally synthesizes a light curve with WASP-12b parameters (1.4% transit depth, 2.64 hour duration).

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a completely synthetic light curve mimicking WASP-12b transit characteristics (~1.4% depth, 0.11d duration) injected with synthetic airmass noise. The evaluation heavily relies on the plot and text report expected strictly at /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series/output/detrended_plot.png and /home/ga/AstroImages/time_series/output/detrend_report.txt respectively.
